description: Request body for the interactive test exploration endpoint (POST /v1/coverage/interactive, coverage_routes.py). Crosses the API boundary; constitutionally required to carry a governing schema (ADR-056 D7). All fields are optional; when target_file is null, the endpoint operates on the full test suite.

target_file.description: Optional repo-relative path to scope the interactive session. When null, operates on the full suite.
